House of Wife : Venus is the Lord of this House. The
Combination of planets with Venus and Planets posited in the 2nd,
5th, 7th, 9th will indicate the Husband, Nature and Profession.
The planetary transit will indicate the auspicious and
inauspicious results fium time to time.

House of Profession : The Satnm is being aspected by
Jupiter for this native. So, she has the respectable Profession.
Moon + Venus are in 2nd in the House of Intelligence. Since there
is an exchange of Mercury and Moon, and Mercury and Venus
posited in 2nd to Satnm, she is known to be an intelligent Arts
Teacher. Actnally she is college Professor. House of Husband
: Mars is the Husband. Mars is exalted and is with Rahu, Husband
